testcase.name: getNonExistingIssue
testcase.system-out:
15:54:34.677 [main] DEBUG org.testng.TestNG -- suiteXmlPath: "/Users/macbook/sc21/myProject/Test_YouTrack_API/testng.xml" Конфигурация загружена из src/test/resources/config.properties RequestSpecification создана для URL: http://localhost:8080 RequestSpecification создана для URL: http://localhost:8080 RequestSpecification создана для URL: http://localhost:8080 RequestSpecification создана для URL: http://localhost:8080 RequestSpecification создана для URL: http://localhost:8080 RequestSpecification создана для URL: http://localhost:8080 Request method: POST Request URI: http://localhost:8080/api/issues Proxy: <none> Request params: <none> Query params: <none> Form params: <none> Path params: <none> Headers: Authorization=Bearer perm-YWRtaW4=.NDEtMQ==.oO9OED1ZqzjlMOne2ZhNCRFbhTBDNv Accept=*/* Content-Type=application/json Cookies: <none> Multiparts: <none> Body: { "summary": "Test summary2", "description": "Test description", "project": { "id": "0-0" } } HTTP/1.1 404 Not Found Date: Tue, 10 Mar 2026 08:54:36 GMT Access-Control-Expose-Headers: Location Access-Control-Expose-Headers: X-Version X-XSS-Protection: 1; mode=block Content-Security-Policy: frame-ancestors 'self'; X-Frame-Options: SAMEORIGIN X-Content-Type-Options: nosniff Referrer-Policy: same-origin Server: YouTrack X-YouTrack-User: admin X-Version: 8d789e55d59dc49f8fd5d60503fead61072bffbac5a1e59b40d961ccdf0fcd86 Content-Type: application/json;charset=utf-8 Cache-Control: no-cache, no-store, no-transform, must-revalidate Content-Length: 90
{ "error": "Not Found", "error_description": "Entity with id non-existing-id-12345 not found" } ✓ Корректная ошибка 404 при запросе несуществующей задачи

testcase.name: getIssueByReadableId
testcase.system-out: Создана тестовая задача: null ✓ Успешно получена задача по readable ID: DEMO-161

testcase.name: getExistingIssue
testcase.system-out:
HTTP/1.1 200 OK Date: Tue, 10 Mar 2026 08:54:37 GMT Access-Control-Expose-Headers: Location Access-Control-Expose-Headers: X-Version X-XSS-Protection: 1; mode=block Content-Security-Policy: frame-ancestors 'self'; X-Frame-Options: SAMEORIGIN X-Content-Type-Options: nosniff Referrer-Policy: same-origin Server: YouTrack X-YouTrack-User: admin X-Version: 8d789e55d59dc49f8fd5d60503fead61072bffbac5a1e59b40d961ccdf0fcd86 Content-Type: application/json;charset=utf-8 Cache-Control: no-cache, no-store, no-transform, must-revalidate Vary: Accept-Encoding, User-Agent Content-Encoding: gzip Content-Length: 129
{ "idReadable": "DEMO-160", "summary": "Test Issue for Get Test 1773132875525", "description": null, "id": "3-161", "$type": "Issue" } ✓ Успешно получена задача ID: 3-161 Readable ID: DEMO-160 Summary: Test Issue for Get Test 1773132875525

testcase.name: addCommentToIssue
testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: expected [201] but found [404] at org.testng.Assert.fail(Assert.java:111) at org.testng.Assert.failNotEquals(Assert.java:1578) at org.testng.Assert.assertEqualsImpl(Assert.java:150) at org.testng.Assert.assertEquals(Assert.java:132) at org.testng.Assert.assertEquals(Assert.java:1419) at org.testng.Assert.assertEquals(Assert.java:1383) at org.testng.Assert.assertEquals(Assert.java:1429) at positive.AddCommentToIssue.addCommentToIssue(AddCommentToIssue.java:23) at java.base/jdk.internal.reflect.DirectMethodHandleAccessor.invoke(DirectMethodHandleAccessor.java:103) at java.base/java.lang.reflect.Method.invoke(Method.java:580) at org.testng.internal.invokers.MethodInvocationHelper.invokeMethod(MethodInvocationHelper.java:139) at org.testng.internal.invokers.TestInvoker.invokeMethod(TestInvoker.java:664) at org.testng.internal.invokers.TestInvoker.invokeTestMethod(TestInvoker.java:227) at org.testng.internal.invokers.MethodRunner.runInSequence(MethodRunner.java:50) at org.testng.internal.invokers.TestInvoker$MethodInvocationAgent.invoke(TestInvoker.java:957) at org.testng.internal.invokers.TestInvoker.invokeTestMethods(TestInvoker.java:200) at org.testng.internal.invokers.TestMethodWorker.invokeTestMethods(TestMethodWorker.java:148) at org.testng.internal.invokers.TestMethodWorker.run(TestMethodWorker.java:128) at java.base/java.util.concurrent.ThreadPoolExecutor.runWorker(ThreadPoolExecutor.java:1144) at java.base/java.util.concurrent.ThreadPoolExecutor$Worker.run(ThreadPoolExecutor.java:642) at java.base/java.lang.Thread.run(Thread.java:1583)

testcase.name: searchIssuesByText
updateIssueDescription

failure.message: 1 expectation failed. Expected status code <200> but was <404>.

testcase.name: createIssueSuccessfully
createIssueWithoutAuth
testcase.system-out: ✓ Негативный тест: создание задачи без авторизации -> 401

testcase.name: createIssueInNonExistentProject
testcase.system-out: ✓ Негативный тест: создание задачи в несуществующем проекте -> 400

testcase.name: createIssueWithInvalidToken
testcase.system-out: ✓ Негативный тест: создание задачи с неверным токеном -> 401

testcase.name: getNonExistingIssue
testcase.system-out: Attempted to retrieve non-existing issue ID: 0-0 Received status code: 404

testcase.name: createIssueWithoutSummary
testcase.system-out:
HTTP/1.1 400 Bad Request Date: Tue, 10 Mar 2026 08:54:37 GMT Access-Control-Expose-Headers: Location Access-Control-Expose-Headers: X-Version X-XSS-Protection: 1; mode=block Content-Security-Policy: frame-ancestors 'self'; X-Frame-Options: SAMEORIGIN X-Content-Type-Options: nosniff Referrer-Policy: same-origin Server: YouTrack X-YouTrack-User: admin X-Version: 8d789e55d59dc49f8fd5d60503fead61072bffbac5a1e59b40d961ccdf0fcd86 Content-Type: application/json;charset=utf-8 Cache-Control: no-cache, no-store, no-transform, must-revalidate Content-Length: 280
{ "error": "invalid_properties", "error_description": "Property Issue.summary is invalid", "error_children": [ { "error": "Issue.summary-is-invalid", "error_description": "Property Issue.summary is invalid", "error_developer_message": "Value for summary is required", "error_field": "summary" } ] } Тест: создание задачи без summary завершен
